scope: All Go files changed on branch task-076-task071-followups vs main. Packages are support / infrastructure only (no DDD model.go in any changed package); full DOM-* / SUB-* checklists do not apply mechanically. Targeted checks below cover the items the request specifically asked for plus cross-cutting rules.

modules.name: services/atlas-login/atlas.com/login
modules.vetNote: Pre-existing 'WaitGroup.Add called from inside new goroutine' at socket/init.go:39 — NOT in this branch's diff (confirmed via git diff main..HEAD).

targetedChecks.name: accessoryPartClassFor delegates to libs/atlas-constants; no service hardcodes 101/102/103
targetedChecks.evidence: libs/atlas-wz/charparts/extract.go:99-109 switches on item.Classification(id / 10000) and references item.ClassificationFaceAccessory / EyeAccessory / Earring (defined libs/atlas-constants/item/constants.go:14-16). composite.go:78-116 already uses item.GetClassification + item.Classification* — same single-source pattern. No other touched package re-hardcodes these magic numbers.

targetedChecks.name: Image.Properties() returns ([]Property, error); every caller handles it
targetedChecks.evidence: libs/atlas-wz/wz/image.go:60 new signature. 17 non-test callers (libs/atlas-wz/{icons,charparts,mapimage} + services/atlas-data/data/workers/{ui,item,skill} + services/atlas-data/data/wztoxml/adapter) all assign (props, err) and either return %w-wrapped error or apply documented best-effort continue. Zero '_, _ :=' or '_ =' Properties() swallowing in non-test code.

targetedChecks.name: publish.go nil-deps guards + tempfile buffering + step-prefixed errors
targetedChecks.evidence: services/atlas-data/atlas.com/data/baseline/publish.go:39-44 nil-deps returns 'publish: nil-db'/'publish: nil-mc'. :47-52 os.CreateTemp + defer os.Remove + defer Close. 9 step-prefixed errors wrap with 'publish: <step>: %w'. io.MultiWriter(tmp, h) at :55 drives sha and tempfile in one pass. publish_test.go:15-24 pins the prefix invariant.

targetedChecks.name: restore.go cleanupAfterFailure is best-effort; original error returned
targetedChecks.evidence: services/atlas-data/atlas.com/data/baseline/restore.go:75-81 cleanupAfterFailure returns nothing, logs each DELETE failure via l.WithError(err).Warnf 'best-effort'. Call sites at :145-149 (table-loop) and :151-156 (ANALYZE) invoke cleanup then return the ORIGINAL err. tenant_baselines UPSERT at :159-166 runs only after both loops succeed. restore_failure_test.go:14-34 pins the ordering.

targetedChecks.name: commodity/processor.go dropped outer transaction; Storage.Add commits per row
targetedChecks.evidence: services/atlas-data/atlas.com/data/commodity/processor.go:24-39 Register iterates ms and calls s.Add(ctx)(m)() per row; no enclosing transaction. document/storage.go:95-108 Storage.Add calls dbSto.Add + regSto.Add per row; db_storage.go:105 wraps each row in its own database.ExecuteTransaction. processor_test.go:15-23 asserts file contains no database.ExecuteTransaction.

targetedChecks.name: wzinput Status implements full JSON:API Marshal/UnmarshalIdentifier interface
targetedChecks.evidence: services/atlas-data/atlas.com/data/wzinput/status.go:24-56 implements GetName/GetID/SetID + GetReferences/GetReferencedIDs/GetReferencedStructs + SetToOneReferenceID/SetToManyReferenceIDs/SetReferencedStructs. Matches the canonical data/status.go:17-58 StatusRestModel 1:1. Handler at :80-82 uses server.MarshalResponse[Status].

crossCuttingChecks.name: Processors/publishers/restorers accept logrus.FieldLogger
crossCuttingChecks.evidence: publish.go:26, restore.go:35, commodity/processor.go:13 all use logrus.FieldLogger; no *logrus.Logger in changed files.

crossCuttingChecks.name: New error paths wrap with %w
crossCuttingChecks.evidence: publish.go has 9 %w-wrapped step errors; restore.go runRestoreTables/restoreOneTable wrap with %w; workers all use 'worker: parse %s: %w'.

crossCuttingChecks.name: POST/PATCH use RegisterInputHandler[T] or have a documented exception
crossCuttingChecks.evidence: baseline/handler.go:23,24 POSTs use rest.RegisterInputHandler[PublishInputModel]/[RestoreInputModel]. wzinput/resource.go:21-26 PATCH bypass is documented (F12) — binary multipart, RegisterInputHandler[T] would consume body as JSON.

crossCuttingChecks.name: No new os.Getenv reads in handlers
crossCuttingChecks.evidence: Zero new os.Getenv hits across changed handler files.

crossCuttingChecks.name: F4 wz seek-path concurrency invariants documented + tested
crossCuttingChecks.evidence: libs/atlas-wz/wz/file.go:222-228 annotates tryParseWithVersion as Open-only single-threaded. libs/atlas-wz/wz/image.go:53-59 + :117-121 document parseMu invariant. parse_race_test.go TestLockParseIsExclusive + TestPropertiesFastPathSkipsLock pin the contract.

crossCuttingChecks.name: consumergroup.Resolve simplified; sprintf moved to call sites
crossCuttingChecks.evidence: libs/atlas-kafka/consumergroup/resolver.go:14-22 returns env-or-default verbatim. atlas-channel/main.go:151 and atlas-login/main.go:66 call Resolve(fmt.Sprintf(template, id)). All ~50 other callers pass a single literal string and remain source-compatible.

nonBlocking: F17 testdata/concurrent.wz is intentionally absent (skipped fixture, documented operator-side carve-out).
F11 no-bounds-triage.json awaits operator run; not a code issue.
notes: All changed packages are support/infrastructure (no model.go in any). Full DOM-* / SUB-* checklist is therefore not exercised; what applies is the cross-cutting set above plus the targeted F-item checks. The branch passes every applicable gate.
